name: Green Beans
recipeInstructions:
To make the green beans:
1. In a large saucepan of boiling salted water, cook beans until crisp-tender, about 6 minutes, and drain well.
2. Serve green beans with mustard sauce.
3. To make the mustard sauce:
- In a bowl whisk together Dijon mustard, sugar, and white wine vinegar until sugar is dissolved.
- Whisk in vegetable oil until the sauce is emulsified.
- Whisk in water to thin the sauce to the desired consistency.
4. The sauce may be made up to 1 day in advance and kept covered and chilled. Serve sauce at room temperature.
5. Makes 1 1/2 cups.
